meaning: n.梭伦(古雅典政治家和立法家),贤人,<美口>议员
examples: Solon, as he looked around at his fabulous wealth and great good fortune, "who do you think is the happiest," he said, "fortunate man you ever knew?"
The senate of 400 founded by Solon in ancient athens.
Mark Solon is managing partner of Highway 12 Ventures.
Other investors include Goldman Sachs subsidiary Cogentrix Energy, PCG Clean Energy and Technology Fund, and Solon AG.
Mr. Solon, a former policy adviser to Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell, is now with Gramm Partners in Washington, D.
